items.text: Reply to BK Venues / Greenpoint Loft tour
Request formal proposals — Tasty Creations & Creative Foods
Schedule consult call — Jillicious Foods (10% off before Aug 1)
Reply to Bassett Caterers (followed up twice)
Draft full budget allocation across categories
Book caterer (target: Tasty Creations or Creative Foods)
Review and sign all vendor contracts
Confirm final guest counts with all vendors

venues.name: The Greenpoint Loft
notes: All Nov 2027 Saturdays available (confirmed by BK Venues)
Tour scheduling reply pending from Johnny
Catering: open to outside vendors; confirm kitchen fee

venues.name: Crystal Springs Resort
notes: Follow up if no reply within 1 week

venues.name: Backup shortlist
notes: 4–5 venues to be identified and contacted

catering.budget_note: Keep food + bar + tax + rentals under ~$28-30K to leave room for all other vendors within $50K total.

vendors.name: Tasty Creations by LCI Caterers

estimate_150_buffet_standard_bar.notes: Tax 8.875% NY. Add ~$750 for 3 bartenders at $250 each.

included: 5-hour event
Cocktail hour with 6 passed appetizers
Full dinner in chosen service style
Dessert (cannolis, sliced fruit, Italian cookies)
Coffee & tea service
All waitstaff & kitchen staff
China, silverware, glassware, linen napkins (multiple color options)
vendors.planner_note: Best value in the field by a wide margin. BK Venues preferred status + 35 years at these exact spaces. The $90/pp buffet with $55/pp open bar is extremely competitive for NYC. Strong recommend to prioritize.
vendors.next_action: Reply with Nov 6/13 dates, request formal proposal for 150 guests at Greenpoint Loft, buffet + open bar standard

vendors.name: Creative Foods Catering

estimate_150_diamond_namebrand.notes: Excludes BK Venue kitchen fee — confirm separately. Beef entrees add $8/pp if selected.

included: Food, service and rentals (linens, silverware, china, glassware, risers, trays)
Professional uniformed staff setup, service, and cleanup
Ceremony chairs setup
All packages: salad, dinner rolls, 2 entrees + vegetarian, 2 sides, 2 desserts
Liquor license, DOH Caterer's Permit, ServSafe certified, fully insured

entrees_notable: Braised short ribs (6-hr red wine demi)
Sultan's delight (braised lamb over eggplant purée)
desserts_notable: Mini dessert shooters (tiramisu, chocolate mousse, key lime)
menu_highlights.dietary: Vegan, GF, dairy-free, nut-free options available on request. Kitchen is not a certified GF/nut-free facility.

vendors.planner_note: Strong credentials, Greenpoint Loft track record, and the most granular bar pricing in the field. Diamond package + name brands bar at ~$30K is competitive. The breadth of menu options is impressive — pistachio lamb chops, churro station, baklava. Moves into top tier with the PDFs reviewed.
vendors.next_action: Reply to confirm Greenpoint Loft, Nov 6 or 13, 150 guests — request Diamond package + name brands bar proposal

vendors.name: Chef Cava
vendors.experience: French Culinary Institute, former La Grenouille (3-star NYT)

estimate_150_buffet_bar.notes: Linens and glassware NOT included — separate cost. Fully custom, seasonal menus.

included: Food, professional staffing, kitchen rentals (silverware, flatware, platters, equipment)
Setup 2 hrs before, breakdown 1 hr after
Custom seasonal menus
Dietary accommodations (vegan, vegetarian, kosher, halal)
vendors.planner_note: Highest food quality ceiling of any vendor. Scott's background at La Grenouille and farm-to-table philosophy means guests will say this wasn't typical wedding food. Budget stretch vs Tasty Creations, but worth a call if food is the top priority.
vendors.next_action: Draft reply to schedule a call and request custom proposal for 150 guests, Greenpoint Loft, Nov 6 or 13

vendors.name: Bartleby & Sage

estimate_150_buffet_premium_bar.rentals_note: Via Broadway Party Rentals — billed separately at caterer discount pricing
estimate_150_buffet_premium_bar.notes: 20% production fee is the budget risk. Rentals additional. Gratuity not included. If venue requires NYS Day of Liquor Permit: add $500 + 3 weeks notice.

included: Staff setup 2 hrs before, cleanup 1 hr after
Production fee covers in-house supplies, platters, trays, napkins, kitchen equipment
Liquor liability insurance included in bar packages
Kids/vendor meals $40 each
not_included: Rentals (via Broadway Party Rentals — billed separately)
NYS Day of Liquor Permit if required ($500 + 3 weeks)

entrees_notable: Slow-braised short ribs (pinot noir sauce, Anson Mills polenta)
desserts_notable: Handmade pies (bourbon-pecan, sweet potato-pumpkin, apple crumb)

vendors.planner_note: Highest food creativity of any vendor — extraordinary apps list, Southern BBQ buffet would be a perfect rustic fit at Greenpoint Loft. Budget concern: 20% production fee adds ~$6K pushing all-in to $39-43K before rentals. Worth a call to see if a leaner configuration is possible.
vendors.next_action: Reply to confirm Greenpoint Loft + dates. Ask if there is a configuration under $30K all-in for 150 guests before committing to a full call.

vendors.name: Jillicious Foods & Events

pricing.note: Fully custom — no standard pricing. Brochure sent. Request 'basic numbers guide' on call.
pricing.discount_offer: 10% off wedding menus if booked by August 1, 2026

vendors.planner_note: Food story concept is interesting and fits a rustic/intimate vibe. 10% discount deadline is urgent — worth a 20-min call before Aug 1 just to get pricing. No pricing transparency is the only concern.
vendors.next_action: Book consult call via calendly.com/jilliciousfoods/clientconversation BEFORE July 31 to lock in 10% discount

vendors.name: EVENTFULLNYC

pricing.note: Plated default. Needs event details to produce custom proposal. Bar pricing TBD.

vendors.planner_note: Has pricing transparency and replied quickly. Needs our details to build a proposal. Worth pursuing if top two fall through.
vendors.next_action: Reply with: 150 guests, Nov 6 or 13, Greenpoint Loft, buffet or family-style preferred, ~6 hours, open bar needed

vendors.name: Marcey Brownstein Catering

pricing.note: Fully custom — call required. Suggested Mon/Tue next week.

vendors.planner_note: No pricing info. Reputation is solid. Follow up if top picks fall through.
vendors.next_action: Reply agreeing to a call. Propose Monday or Tuesday, ask for a few time options.

vendors.name: Dish Food & Events

pricing.note: No pricing yet. Sent wedding brochure link. Has scheduling link.

vendors.planner_note: Warm response, Long Island City based, knows BK Venues. Low priority until top picks are resolved.
vendors.next_action: Reply mentioning Greenpoint Loft, 150 guests, Nov 6 or 13, ask for pricing

vendors.name: Bassett Caterers

pricing.note: BK Venue packages available. Need our date to check availability.

vendors.planner_note: Familiar with all BK Venues locations and have BK-designed packages. Followed up twice — respond soon or they may move on.
vendors.next_action: Reply with Nov 6/13 dates, Greenpoint Loft, 150 guests — agree to a call

vendors.name: Fig & Pig Catering

pricing.note: All-in (food, bar, staff, tax, gratuity) but rentals are separate. Likely over budget for 150 guests.

vendors.planner_note: Outstanding food reputation (5.0 stars, 'best wedding food I've ever had' reviews). But $225-325/pp all-in for 150 guests approaches the entire $50K wedding budget. Only viable if guest count drops significantly.
vendors.next_action: No action needed at this time — revisit only if guest count drops below 100

decision_framework.budget_comfortable: ~$23-26K — Tasty Creations (buffet + open bar standard + tax)
decision_framework.budget_stretch: ~$28-32K — Creative Foods Diamond + name brands bar
next_steps: Get formal proposals from Tasty Creations AND Creative Foods simultaneously
Schedule Jillicious call before Aug 1 for 10% discount
Reply to Bassett (they followed up twice)
Defer Bartleby & Sage and Fig & Pig — over budget at 150 guests

notes.text: NJ/NY vendor pricing often carries hidden service charges and layered fees — always request fully itemized quotes before signing.
Pursue multiple venues simultaneously — fall Saturdays in this market book 12–18 months in advance.
Nov 6 and Nov 13 are the recommended date targets. Nov 20 carries Thanksgiving travel conflict risk.
Jillicious Foods: 10% discount if booked by Aug 1, 2026 — schedule consult call ASAP.
Top catering picks: Tasty Creations (~$24K est.) and Creative Foods Diamond pkg (~$30K est.) — request formal proposals from both.
Bartleby & Sage 20% production fee adds ~$6K — pushes to $39-43K before rentals. Over budget at 150 guests.
